no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose a stable seed
prompt: Create a production source sheet for Ember Road town forge resource/equipment icons. Arrange as a clean row-major grid on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background with at least 64px outer margin and 64px gutters between every visible pixel and shadow. Icons requested, one isolated icon per slot, no frames fused into icons: Mine Lantern glowing warm gold; ember shard crystal; blacksmith hammer crossed with small anvil; mine depth unlock marker; lit Depth 2 doorway marker; equipped lantern badge; shard cost paid/check mark symbol without text; route/depth compass marker; small forge flame; sturdy iron lock and unlocked iron lock. Painterly 2D fantasy browser RPG material language: brass, iron, leather, ember glow, carved stone, parchment accents. Strong silhouettes readable at small gameplay size, consistent lighting and line weight.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, fake glyphs, UI labels, counters, watermarks, copied reference-game icons, copied ornament shapes, composed screen, buttons, panels, frames, stretchable UI bases, #00ff00 inside icons, cropped icons, touching shadows, merged components, busy backgrounds, pseudo-text, logos, one fused screenshot, panel-only shop UI
source_family_role: cuttable Mine Lantern, ember shard, forge, unlock/depth, equipped result, compass, flame, lock, and unlock icons
rejected_candidate_notes: Accepted as first runtime-relevant icon source sheet. The sheet has a flat chroma background, separated silhouettes, and no visible text. Future crop manifest must trim each icon and record semantic ids.
